title: Masterclass Event for Offer Holders and Applicants in Delhi
text: Masterclass in Delhi Event Status: Completed Date: March 18, 2025 Location: Shaheed Sukhdev College Of Business Studies, Sector 16, Rohini, Delhi, 110085, India Recommended for: Offer holders and potential applicants Book now Find out first-hand what the classroom experience is like by coming along to an introductory lecture.
